query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Demand For EVs Rises In May As Higher Fuel Prices Drive Buyers Towards Electric Mobility
articles.description: India’s electric vehicle market witnessed stronger demand in May as rising petrol and diesel prices encouraged consumers to shift towards EVs. Reports by Nomura and HSBC highlighted increased penetration across passenger vehicles and electric two-wheelers.

articles.title: Trump's Stance On Iran Could Trigger Record Gas Prices: Analyst
articles.description: Trump's 'I Don't Care' attitude towards Iran negotiations could spike gas prices in the U.S. as high fuel costs continue affecting people.

articles.title: Bank shares snap 4-day losses to recover 700 pts from day's low as crude oil prices ease to $93
articles.description: Bank shares erased losses and moved into positive territory after Brent crude prices slipped below the USD 95-a-barrel mark.

articles.title: Markets gain and oil drops as Trump's peace signals reassure investors
articles.description: Oil prices retreated around 4% from Monday’s highs as markets responded positively to US President Donald Trump’s reassuring comments that negotiations with Iran are progressing.

articles.title: India Inc's 4QFY26 earnings were decent but 1QFY27 could be bumpy: Kotak
articles.description: India Inc delivered better-than-expected earnings in the March quarter of FY26, but the current quarter could be 'bumpy' as the ongoing West Asia conflict raises risks from higher oil prices and input costs, according to a Kotak Institutional Equities report.

articles.title: Strait of Hormuz could decide India’s growth story, Kotak shares market view
articles.description: Kotak expects strong Nifty earnings growth despite West Asia conflict, but oil prices and Hormuz risks remain crucial.

articles.title: Crude Oil Futures Slip Amid Uncertainty Over US
articles.description: Crude oil futures slipped on MCX as global benchmarks Brent and WTI retreated amid uncertainty over US–Iran ceasefire talks and fragile Israel–Hezbollah truce efforts. Learn how volatile geopolitics, mixed diplomatic signals and concerns over the Strait of Hormuz are weighing on oil prices and market sentiment.

articles.title: Nifty Rebounds 300 Points From Day’s Low, Sensex Jumps Over 539 Points As Falling Crude Oil Prices Trigger Strong Buying
articles.description: Indian stock markets staged a strong recovery on Tuesday afternoon after crude oil prices declined on hopes of continued US-Iran talks. Nifty surged nearly 300 points from its intraday low, while Sensex gained over 539 points as investors returned to buying across sectors.

articles.title: Aztec Fluids & Machinery Reports Resilient FY26 Performance, Advances Technological Sovereignty to Drive Long
articles.description: Ahmedabad (Gujarat) [India], June 2: Aztec Fluids & Machinery Limited (BSE: 544177), one of India's leading coding, marking and industrial traceability solutions providers, announced its audited financial results for H2 FY26 and FY26. Despite a challenging global operating environment marked by geopolitical uncertainties, supply chain disruptions, fluctuating crude oil prices and macroeconomic volatility, the Company delivered resilient business performance.

articles.title: FOREX-Dollar stuck in narrow band as traders eye Middle East, US data
articles.description: A peace deal between the U.S. and Iran would ease pressure on currencies from oil-importing countries like Japan and the euro zone while ‌curbing safe-haven demand for the dollar. U.S. President Donald Trump said on Monday that talks with Iran were ongoing, despite a report that Tehran had suspended indirect negotiations with the United States to end hostilities, a move that prompted a slight drop in oil prices.
